body: A vocoder shapes a carrier (a harmonically rich synth tone) with the moving spectrum of a modulator (usually speech). Vocodex ships with a built-in Sytrus-based internal carrier, so a talking synth can be built inside one plugin without routing an external instrument.

Band contouring emphasises the frequency bands that carry consonants and vowels, keeping vocoded speech readable; band unison thickens the result; and the built-in Soundgoodizer maximiser lifts the final level. The envelope follower's hold and release times set how tightly the output tracks the modulator.
